---
name: Missing content
about: Add missing talks, hacks, participants or other content from a past event
title: "Missing content: [event name]"
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

**Which event?**
e.g. .Astronomy 8, Oxford 2016

**What is missing?**
e.g. talks list, specific hack, participant names, agenda

**The content**
Please provide as much detail as you can:

- Talk title:
- Speaker:
- Hack name:
- Creators:
- Description:
- Links (source, demo, video):

**How do you know this? (optional)**
e.g. I attended this event / I was the speaker / I found it in...
